faqItems.question: Do I need ad budget?
faqItems.answer: No. The core system is organic. We include a simple intro to boosting posts later if you want.

faqItems.question: Will this work outside Ghana?
faqItems.answer: Yes — WhatsApp-first outreach works across West Africa. Examples use GHS and local context.
